allow: Bash(node -e "const { TOTP, generateSecret, generateURI, verify } = require\('otplib'\); console.log\(typeof TOTP, typeof generateSecret, typeof generateURI, typeof verify\)")

Bash(node -e "const o = require\('otplib'\); const { TOTP, generateSecret, generateURI, verify, NobleCryptoPlugin, ScureBase32Plugin } = o; console.log\(typeof NobleCryptoPlugin, typeof ScureBase32Plugin\)")
